rationale: The only direct evidence is a bibliography-level DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.46.3.384) with no in-text citation context, so we cannot tell how substantively it is used. While there is some conceptual overlap (both involve social-proof/descriptive-norm persuasion cues), the cited paper’s core focus on emotion × heuristic interactions is not clearly central to the citing paper’s weak-tie consensus mechanism, so it is not safe to drop or clearly keep.
